latestEntry.notes: Week 6 Day 3 of Talk 4 (Week 2 of 2). Inversion focus: How to guarantee misery by failing to apply multidisciplinary thinking. Core frameworks: Inversion (reverse thinking), Man with a Hammer Syndrome, Lollapalooza Effects. 5 case snapshots - New Coke fiasco (violated lollapalooza thinking), WeWork valuation collapse (overspecialization), founder who ignored inversion (failed to ask what could go wrong), Berkshire Coca-Cola investment (applied lollapalooza thinking), manager who relied on one metric (hammer syndrome). Key takeaway: Invert before you act - spend 10 minutes listing failure modes before any decision. Commitment: Pick one upcoming decision and list top 5 failure modes. Message delivered successfully.
